50002026-03-23 15:17:01 0xf696...1b7d BUY Bitcoin Up or Down - March 23, 11:15A... NO8.9 $0.770 directclob_ws

Showing first 5,000 of 10,865 trades.

Methodology

  • Ground truth pricing: Uses actual CLOB price at (trade_time + latency) when available. Falls back to slippage model when no delayed price exists.
  • Fees: 2% taker fee on entry + exit. Resolution exits: entry fee only (token redemption, not a trade).
  • Resolution: Market close auto-exits at $1.00 (winning token) or $0.00 (losing token).
  • Dedup: Cross-source dedup by tx_hash (CLOB source preferred over chain).
  • Wallet PnL: Computed at wallet's actual prices with same 2% fee assumption.
  • Our PnL: Entry/exit at actual market price at delayed timestamp, or slippage model if unavailable.
